tools.name: doctor
tools.description: Run local DebugBundle environment diagnostics.

tools.name: smoke
tools.description: Run the end-to-end smoke flow for a hosted project.

tools.name: validate
tools.description: Validate local DebugBundle project setup and optionally apply fixes.

tools.name: verify_cloud
tools.description: Verify hosted ingestion or actively prove hosted incident creation.

tools.name: verify_local
tools.description: Run the local verification flow against the current repository.

tools.name: analyze
tools.description: Run local agent-oriented DebugBundle analysis.

tools.name: get_bundle
tools.description: Fetch the debug bundle for an incident.

tools.name: get_incident
tools.description: Fetch a single incident by incident id.

tools.name: get_incident_context
tools.description: Fetch deterministic one-call incident context for explanation and triage.

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Fetch log records for an incident from the hosted API.

tools.name: get_reproduction
tools.description: Fetch the reproduction artifact for an incident.

tools.name: list_incidents
tools.description: List incidents from local storage, cloud storage, or the combined connected view.

tools.name: reopen_incident
tools.description: Reopen an incident by incident id.

tools.name: reopen_incidents
tools.description: Reopen incidents in bulk by incident id.

tools.name: resolve_incident
tools.description: Resolve an incident by incident id.

tools.name: resolve_incidents
tools.description: Resolve incidents in bulk by incident id.

tools.name: get_improvement
tools.description: Fetch a single hosted improvement opportunity by id.

tools.name: get_improvement_bundle
tools.description: Fetch the hosted improvement bundle artifact for a project improvement opportunity.

tools.name: list_improvements
tools.description: List hosted improvement opportunities for the current workspace or a specific project.

tools.name: reopen_improvement
tools.description: Reopen a hosted improvement opportunity.

tools.name: resolve_improvement
tools.description: Resolve a hosted improvement opportunity.

tools.name: snooze_improvement
tools.description: Snooze a hosted improvement opportunity until an ISO8601 timestamp.

tools.name: create_github_dispatch_rule
tools.description: Create a GitHub dispatch automation rule for a project.

tools.name: delete_github_dispatch_rule
tools.description: Delete a GitHub dispatch automation rule.

tools.name: get_github_status
tools.description: Get the project GitHub App installation status and optional project repo assignment.

tools.name: list_github_deliveries
tools.description: List GitHub dispatch delivery history for a project.

tools.name: list_github_dispatch_rules
tools.description: List GitHub dispatch automation rules for a project.

tools.name: list_github_repositories
tools.description: List repositories available to the project GitHub App installation for owner/admin callers.

tools.name: remove_project_github_repo
tools.description: Remove a project GitHub repository assignment.

tools.name: retry_github_delivery
tools.description: Retry a failed GitHub dispatch delivery.

tools.name: set_project_github_repo
tools.description: Assign a primary GitHub repository to a project.

tools.name: update_github_dispatch_rule
tools.description: Update a GitHub dispatch automation rule.

tools.name: create_member_token
tools.description: Create a new member token.

tools.name: create_project_token
tools.description: Create a new project token.

tools.name: list_member_tokens
tools.description: List member tokens for the authenticated member.

tools.name: list_project_tokens
tools.description: List project tokens for a project.

tools.name: revoke_member_token
tools.description: Revoke a member token.

tools.name: revoke_project_token
tools.description: Revoke a project token.

tools.name: create_webhook
tools.description: Create a webhook endpoint.

tools.description: Delete a webhook endpoint.

tools.name: list_webhook_deliveries
tools.description: List deliveries for a webhook endpoint.

tools.description: List webhooks for a project.

tools.description: Retry a webhook delivery.

tools.description: Queue a synthetic webhook delivery.

tools.description: Update a webhook endpoint.

tools.description: Return a browser Slack connect URL for a project.

tools.description: Update a weekly report delivery channel. Email channel config supports up to 3 recipients in config.to.
